text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I did it... I did it, I did it! Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's my day off, so I head downtown. There, I bump into a rather jovial
Rice Shower.
choice_data_list: Looks like you're in a good mood, Rice!
Looks like you're in a good mood, Rice!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ah, Big Brother! Hehe... Mhm. Today's a good day!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ah, Big Sister! Hehe... Mhm. Today's a good day!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Well, um... I got a ticket for the stage adaptation of "The Blue Rose
of Good Fortune."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: If I recall correctly, that's the picture book Rice loves.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Thanks!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
You know how I always end up bringing misfortune... So usually I
avoid places like the theater, with lots of people.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: But... But, you see... Th-this play is special, because...

text_block_list.name: Black Cat
text_block_list.text: Meooow!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Eep?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Out of nowhere, a black cat snatches Rice's ticket from her pocket
and runs away!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: N-no way! Mr. Kitty, wait up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rice Shower gives chase to the black cat, and I quickly follow behind!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... It went this way!

text_block_list.name: Construction Worker
text_block_list.text:
Slow down there, missy! Sorry, but this road's blocked off for
construction.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Wh-what should I do? Mr. Kitty definitely went this way!

text_block_list.name: Construction Worker
text_block_list.text: Well, I could show you the detour... But that hill's a real killer.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ah... Sh-show me, please! A hill won't be a problem... I can run!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Big Brother, let me know if you get tired, okay? I can hold your hand!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Big Sister, let me know if you get tired, okay? I can hold your hand!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... There you are!

text_block_list.name: Black Cat
text_block_list.text: Meow! Meow!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Mhm, sneaky beaky-like! Come here, Mr. Kitty, I won't bite—promise!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice and I slowly creep up to the cat, when suddenly, I feel something
under my foot!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Eep!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Owie... What's a banana peel doing here—and two, at that! You okay,
Big Brother?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Owie... What's a banana peel doing here—and two, at that! You okay,
Big Sister?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
By the time we're back on our feet, the cat is nowhere to be seen. We
didn't even see which direction it ran off in...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Big Brother, I'll go ask around and see if anyone's spotted Mr. Kitty.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Big Sister, I'll go ask around and see if anyone's spotted Mr. Kitty.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower stands up, musters all her courage, and begins asking the
people nearby for info.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: E-e-excuse me! Have you seen a black cat around here?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice and I keep searching for the black cat. Some time later, around
sunset, we finally make a breakthrough!

text_block_list.name: Black Cat
text_block_list.text: Meow!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Mr. Kitty! You still have the ticket in your mouth... Thank goodness!
choice_data_list: All right, I'll take it from here.
All right, I'll take it from here.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Big Brother... I appreciate it.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Big Sister... I appreciate it.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: But... I have to give it my all. I want to give it my all.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: So... here I go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having made up her mind, Rice walks over to the bush where the cat
is hiding.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Mr. Kitty! P-please don't run away—I have something to tell you.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: That ticket is very precious to me... S-so I want you to give it back!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Pretty please... Meow!

text_block_list.name: Black Cat
text_block_list.text: Meow.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The black cat puts down the ticket and walks away!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Mr. Kitty... Thanks so much!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: That's a relief... Big Brother, thanks for helping out too!
choice_data_list: It's because you never gave up, Rice!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: That's a relief... Big Sister, thanks for helping out too!
choice_data_list: It's because you never gave up, Rice!
It's because you never gave up, Rice!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Mhm... Only because you were with me.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Mhm... Only because you were with me.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
When you're by my side, I feel like I can give it my all—like I can do
anything.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
When you're by my side, I feel like I can give it my all—like I can do
anything.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: So, um... Big Brother...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: So, um... Big Sister...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Please take this ticket!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Um, actually... I bought two tickets. You know, as thanks for always
looking out for me.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Um, actually... I bought two tickets. You know, as thanks for always
looking out for me.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
W-would you come see this with me? Or is going with me... just a
bother...
choice_data_list: Not at all—I'm happy you invited me!
Not at all—I'm happy you invited me!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: You mean it?! Th-thank goodness!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But as I take the ticket from Rice, something concerning catches my
eye...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh? By today, you mean—aaah!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: You're right! We have to hurry then!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, Rice and I make it to the theater in the nick of time,
somehow managing to catch the evening show.
